Member.Name: Interface_Speed
Member.Description: Interface speed currently in use. Speed in Mbps (e.g., 0, 10, 100, 1000, etc.)

Member.Name: Interface_Flags
Member.Description: Interface status flags

Member.Name: Physical_Address
Member.Description: MAC layer address

Member.Name: InOctets
Member.Description: Octets received on the interface

Member.Name: InUcastPackets
Member.Description: Unicast packets received on the interface

Member.Name: InNucastPackets
Member.Description: Non-unicast packets received on the interface

Member.Name: InDiscards
Member.Description: Inbound packets received on the interface but discarded

Member.Name: InErrors
Member.Description: Inbound packets that contain errors (does not include In Discards)

Member.Name: OutOctets
Member.Description: Octets sent on the interface

Member.Name: OutUcastPackets
Member.Description: Unicast packets sent on the interface

Member.Name: OutNucastPackets
Member.Description: Non-unicast packets sent on the interface

Member.Name: OutDiscards
Member.Description: Outbound packets discarded

Member.Name: OutErrors
Member.Description: Outbound packets that contain errors

Member.Name: Alignment_Errors
Member.Description: Frames received that are not an integral number of octets in length

Member.Name: FCS_Errors
Member.Description: Frames received that do not pass the FCS check

Member.Name: Single_Collisions
Member.Description: Successfully transmitted frames which experienced exactly one collision

Member.Name: Multiple_Collisions
Member.Description: Successfully transmitted frames which experienced more than one collision

Member.Name: SQE_Test_Errors
Member.Description: Number of times SQE test error message is generated

Member.Name: Deferred_Transmissions
Member.Description: Frames for which first transmission attempt is delayed because the medium is busy

Member.Name: Late_Collisions
Member.Description: Number of times a collision is detected later than 512 bit- times into the transmission of a packet

Member.Name: Excessive_Collisions
Member.Description: Frames for which transmission fails due to excessive collisions

Member.Name: MAC_Transmit_Errors
Member.Description: Frames for which transmission fails due to an internal MAC sublayer transmit error

Member.Name: Carrier_Sense_Errors
Member.Description: Times that the carrier sense condition was lost or never asserted when attempting to transmit a frame

Member.Name: Frame_Too_Long
Member.Description: Frames received that exceed the maximum permitted frame size

Member.Name: MAC_Receive_Errors
Member.Description: Frames for which reception on an interface fails due to an internal MAC sublayer receive error

Member.Name: Control_Bits
Member.Description: 0 Auto-negotiate 0 indicates 802.3 link auto-negotiation is disabled. 1 indicates auto-negotiation is enabled.

Member.Name: Forced_Interface_Speed
Member.Description: Speed at which the interface shall be forced to operate. Speed in Mbps (10, 100, 1000, etc.)

Member.Name: Interface_Label
Member.Description: Label like "TX5"

Member.Name: Interface_Port_Index
Member.Description: port index

Member.Name: Interface_Port_Description
Member.Description: Port description

Member.Name: Broascast_Storm_Protection
Member.Description: Only BCM

Member.Name: Interface_Utilization
Member.Description: Percentage of entire interface bandwidth being used (0-100)

Member.Name: Utilization_Alarm_Upper_Threshold
Member.Description: Upper percentage at which to declare a utilization alarm (0-100).

Member.Name: Utilization_Alarm_Lower_Threshold
Member.Description: Lower percentage at which to declare a utilization alarm (0-100).

Member.Name: Port_Link_Alarm
Member.Description: 0: Ignore 1:On (Relay 1) 2:On (Relay 2) 3:Off (Relay1) 4:Off (Relay2)

Member.Name: Port_TrafficOverload_Alarm
Member.Description: 0:Disable 1:Enable(Relay 1) 2:Enable(Relay 2)

Member.Name: Tx_Unicast_Packet_Rate
Member.Description: number of TX unicast packets per second.

Member.Name: Rx_Unicast_Packet_Rate
Member.Description: number of RX unicast packets per second.

Member.Name: Tx_Multicast_Packet_Rate
Member.Description: number of TX multicast packets per second.

Member.Name: Rx_Multicast_Packet_Rate
Member.Description: number of RX multicast packets per second.

Member.Name: Tx_Broadcast_Packet_Rate
Member.Description: number of TX broadcast packets per second.

Member.Name: Rx_Broadcast_Packet_Rate
Member.Description: number of RX broadcast packets per second.

Member.Name: Tx_Multicast_Packet
Member.Description: Total number of Tx multicast packets

Member.Name: Rx_Multicast_Packet
Member.Description: Total number of Rx multicast packets

Member.Name: Tx_Broadcast_Packet
Member.Description: Totalnumber of Tx Multicast packets

Member.Name: Rx_Broadcast_Packet
Member.Description: Total number of Rx broadcast packets

Member.Name: Redundant_Port_Status
Member.Description: Bit 0 = Disable, Bit 1 =Not Red. port, Bit 2 = Link down, Bit 3 = Blocking, Bit 4 = Learning, Bit 5 = Forwarding
